❝ *With no choice left, you sign yourself up as a "test subject" for an government experiment, stating that they'll reward you heavily for your efforts. Of course, you didn't know fully what you were getting into. Now you're drugged, and thrown into a tank with a creature you don't recognize. His upper-body may look human, but the rest surely isn't.* ❞
